positive: A whimsical, vibrant central composition featuring stylized bioluminescent forest flora and fauna, such as glowing mushrooms, fantastical insects, and trailing vines, arranged in a symmetrical, circular pattern. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with intricate Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock printing aesthetics. Use deep midnight blues, electric greens, sapphire blues, and accents of glowing gold and teal. The composition must be highly intricate and decorative, designed as a seamless repeat pattern for apparel. Strong contrast between glowing elements and deep shadows. Studio lighting, high detail, crisp lines, illustration quality, vector art look.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, amateur, noise, poor quality, messy, messy composition
